mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, patient_id, id_type, id_value, source_org, is_primary, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM patient_external_id WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patient_external_id ( tenant_id, patient_id, id_type, id_value, source_org, is_primary ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{patientId}, #{idType}, #{idValue}, #{sourceOrg}, #{isPrimary} )
